title: Profile / Avatar - Psychedelic Light Projection Portrait
description: Generates a realistic editorial beauty portrait with colorful wavy light patterns projected across a model and background.
prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 high-fashion beauty portrait of a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="warm light brown hair"} in loose, slightly tousled layers, looking back over her shoulder toward the camera with parted lips and soft confident eye contact.
